params.prompt: Create a premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club. Concept: Founder AI System Blueprint. Dark matte black background with graphite blueprint grid, silver-white typography, controlled electric blue highlights, subtle technical annotations, high negative space. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Visual: elegant blueprint diagram of three AI agents connected to a founder command hub. No large character. Premium business education look, mobile readable, exact text, safe margins, no extra logos, no clutter.
